content:
# Recommendations — after iter-028

## Closest to completion — the SINGLE remaining comm-chain blocker
**`tensorPowAdd_comm` succ-hexagon (L3682)** — the only explicit sorry; closing it auto-cleans
`sectionsMul_mul_comm` and unblocks the `sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring` assembly (the faithful
Stacks-01CV completion, critical path).

### Prescribed approach (from the prover's verified-in-session handoff — do NOT retry the naive `rw`)
The prover VERIFIED that `rw [tensorPowAdd_succ, ih]` leaves
`α⁻¹ ≪≫ WR(β_{L^m,L^c} ≪≫ μ_{c,m} ≪≫ reindex) L = β_{L^m,L^{c+1}} ≪≫ μ_{c+1,m} ≪≫ reindex`,
and `μ_{c+1,m}` (1st-index successor) is UNREACHABLE from the 2nd-index recursion. **Do NOT re-dispatch a
prover to grind the hexagon directly — it has no path.** Two structural prerequisites first:
1. **Build `tensorPowAdd_succ_left : μ_{c+1,m} ≅ … μ_{c,m} …`** — a 1st-index recursion characterization
   of `tensorPowAdd`, via `tensorPowAdd_assoc`/`tensorObjAssoc` + `tensorPow_succ`. This is the missing
   brick; it is the analogue of the 2nd-index `tensorPowAdd_succ` (which is `rfl`).
2. **Then the descended `BraidedCategory.hexagon_forward`** through `sheafification` (exactly the descent
   pattern of `tensorObjRightUnitor_eq_braiding_unit` / `braiding_leftUnitor`), with
   `tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible` (axiom-clean, available) collapsing the doubled-`L` slide.
   `monoidal` tactic does NOT handle braidings — needs the explicit hexagon + braiding bridges, cf. the
   `tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_core` generic-`M` abstraction that closed the B6 pentagon.

### Scope warning
This is the **braided analogue of the B6 `tensorPowAdd_assoc` pentagon**, which was the 8-iter wall
(017→024) closed only by the iter-023 2nd-index refactor + iter-025 generic-`M` core. The hexagon is
INTRINSICALLY braided (cannot be re-oriented away — comm IS about the braiding). **Recommend the plan
agent dispatch `effort-breaker` on `lem:tensorPowAdd_comm` succ** (cut: build `tensorPowAdd_succ_left`
first as its own sub-lemma; then the hexagon as a generic-`M` core, mirroring B6) before the prover round,
and consider `mathlib-analogist` (cross-domain-inspiration) for the hexagon-descent shape if the first
prover round stalls.

## Blueprint debts (plan agent — blueprint-writer + leandag)
- **(major) Reconcile transport prose** in `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`:
  `def:sheafModule_monoidalStructure` (L660) and `cor:sheafModule_braided_symmetric` (L682–683) claim
  commutativity is "inherited rather than hand-proved" — false; it needs `β_{L,L}=id` (invertibility).
  The dedicated `lem:tensorPowAdd_comm` block is correct; align the transport prose to it. Dispatch a
  blueprint-writer (informal prose is plan-agent domain, not review's). lvbc report:
  `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-iter028.md`.
- **1-to-1 coverage debt — 6 new unmatched `lean_aux` to blueprint** (all in `SectionGradedRing.lean`,
  ns `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules`):
  - `moduleCat_braiding_hom_eq_comm`, `moduleCat_braiding_self_hom_eq_id`,
    `braiding_self_app_eq_id_of_invertible`, `braiding_comp_unit_eq_unit_of_isInvertible` — descent
    plumbing for `tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`; fold under `lem:braiding_eq_id_of_invertible`.
  - `tensorObjRightUnitor_eq_braiding_unit` — a REAL coherence lemma (`ρ = β ≫ λ`, descended
    `MonoidalCategory.braiding_leftUnitor`); give it a sub-block under `lem:tensorPowAdd_comm` base case.
  - `iso_trans_hom_val_app_apply` — generic section-level iso-composite functoriality; one-line mention
    or leave as plumbing.
- **(minor)** `lem:braiding_eq_id_of_invertible` prose asserts the `β_{L^{⊗m},L^{⊗m}}=id` generalization,
  but Lean only formalizes `β_{L,L}=id`. The succ-hexagon needs only `β_{L,L}=id`, so nothing is blocked;
  add a `% NOTE` that the `L^{⊗m}` case is prose-only (or have the writer scope the block to `β_{L,L}`).

## Do NOT re-assign
- `tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible` — DONE, axiom-clean.
- `sectionsMul_mul_comm` — DONE modulo `tensorPowAdd_comm`; no work on it itself.
- `sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring` — correctly deferred (no-sorry invariant); assemble AFTER the
  succ-hexagon closes.
- The 4 χ sorries (`QuotScheme.lean`) — separate cohomology leg, untouched.

## Reusable patterns discovered (→ Knowledge Base)
- **Ring-spelling diamond dissolution:** when a generic `ModuleCat` helper needs `Module.Invertible R M`
  but the call site spells the ring two defeq-but-syntactically-distinct ways (`X.presheaf.obj` vs
  `X.sheaf.obj ⋙ forget₂`), pass the instance as an EXPLICIT argument — it unifies by defeq, sidestepping
  instance synthesis that fails on the spelling.
- **Sheaf-descent of a presheaf morphism equation:** `(toPresheaf _).map_injective` →
  `TopCat.Sheaf.hom_ext _ _ hbasis` (the UNDERLYING Ab sheaf + the `IsInvertible`-carried basis, NOT
  `Scheme.Modules.hom_ext` = ⊤-trap) → per-basis-open `erw [toPresheaf_map_app_apply]`.
- **Sheafified-iso = 𝟙 via adjunction:** `Iso.ext` → `change sheafification.map f = 𝟙` →
  `homEquiv.injective` → `rw [homEquiv_unit ×2]; erw [Functor.map_id, Category.comp_id]` (plain rw/simp
  FAIL on the `𝟙`) → unit-naturality `.symm.trans` the descent equation.
